case_title: JAMES BEDINGHAUS ET AL VS. AIRBNB, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-30-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BEDINGHAUS, JAMES BEDINGHAUS, EILEEN AIRBNB, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEDINGHAUS, JAMES BEDINGHAUS, EILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO AIRBNB, INC.
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT'S RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW VIA MESSENGER.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFFS JAMES BEDINGHAUSE AND EILEEN BEDINGHAUS ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY GREG ANDERSON. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEDINGHAUS, JAMES BEDINGHAUS, EILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $6,724.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,814.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,774.11 FILED BY BEDINGHAUS, JAMES BEDINGHAUS, EILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SUBPEONA FILED WITHOUT ORIGNAL SUBPEONA
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) GREG ANDERSON FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
